stem:
The dot plots represent the distributions of values in data sets A and B.

Which of the following statements must be true?

I. The median of data set A is equal to the median of data set B.
II. The standard deviation of data set A is equal to the standard deviation of data set B.
explanation: Both dot plots are symmetric with an odd number of values centered at 13, so both medians are 13 and statement I is true. Data set B has more values at the extremes (10 and 16), so it is more spread out and has a larger standard deviation, making statement II false.
